title: dracocephalum origanoides subsp. origanoides
intro: Dracocephalum origanoides subsp. origanoides, also known as Prickly Blue Copegent, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Dracocephalum origanoides subsp. origanoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a flavoring agent.
